steps.title: Identify the antecedent and required form
steps.content: The blank precedes compelling narrative, requiring a possessive form to modify the noun. The antecedent is the epic poem, which is singular.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
A possessive pronoun must agree with its antecedent in number, so the singular antecedent the epic poem requires the singular possessive its (B).

The other options are either contractions that cannot function as possessives (A and D) or a plural possessive (C).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
